purpose: Theatrical side spotlight, dramatic shadow, atmospheric smoke. Cinema-noir masculine.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Cinema noir product photography of {product_descriptor}, dramatic single-source side spotlight from upper right at 60 degrees casting sharp diagonal shadow across scene, low-key dark lighting overall, atmospheric haze and smoke filling space catching light beams, deep blacks dominate, product in light pool revealing rich material texture, heavy contrast chiaroscuro, shot on 50mm at f/4, no text, no watermark, no people {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T11. Saudi adaptation guidance: For Saudi men's fragrance, oud cologne. Leans amber/gold rather than blue noir, culturally adjacent rather than imported. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per month for masculine brands.
